abilities.name: Public Outcry
abilities.text: When this model is targeted by an attack action, if this crew's scandal bar is half full or more, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: "The Plot is Afoot!"
abilities.text: After the opposing player reveals a scheme, this model may drain a (soulstone) to gain a Fast token.

actions.name: Blackmail
actions.effects: Target must either discard a (soulstone) or this model may draw a card and increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage.

actions.name: Exposé
actions.effects: Target gains a Slow token. This model may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2 to deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: Hot-Headed
triggers.text: Target declares an attack action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Investigative Journalism
triggers.text: Target reveals a card in its control hand. If it is 6 or less, they are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: On the Scene
triggers.text: Target declares the Interact action, controlled by this model.

actions.name: Healing Energy
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.

triggers.name: "I've Got Your Back!"
triggers.text: Engaged ally only. Target is placed in base contact with this model.
